name: Medical Reasoning (MedXpertQA)
description: Prompt-engineer a fixed Claude model to answer fixed, seeded MedXpertQA multiple-choice questions. Iterate on the train split (rich per-question log); report once on the disjoint held-out test split (aggregate-only).
objective: Maximize held-out test accuracy by editing only the system prompt, tuning exclusively against the train split.

dataset.subsample: single seed=42 draw of 40 distinct items, partitioned into disjoint train/test of 20 each
